overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long brown coat entering and walking through a grand gothic cathedral interior. The scene features ornate stone architecture, wooden choir stalls, checkered marble floors, and a high domed ceiling with intricate artwork.

events.description: character walks through wooden doorway from narrow corridor into grand cathedral nave

agents.ego_description: character walks through a wooden doorway into the larger cathedral interior

entered.detail: weathered wooden door frame with corrugated metal walls on sides
black and white checkered marble tile floor extending into the hall
dark wooden choir stalls lining the left side of the aisle
dark wooden choir stalls lining the right side of the aisle
ornate brass candelabra with multiple candles atop the choir stalls

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a wooden doorway entrance. The character walks through the frame into a grand gothic cathedral, transitioning from the narrow doorway into the main nave with checkered marble floors and wooden choir stalls visible on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral nave with central aisle and domed ceiling

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily down the central aisle between wooden choir stalls toward the altar area

entered.detail: tall stone columns supporting the gothic arches along the nave
tall stone columns supporting the gothic arches along the nave
high vaulted domed ceiling with intricate architectural details
elaborate painted artwork on the ceiling dome with golden accents

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the central aisle of the grand cathedral nave. Wooden choir stalls line both sides with brass candelabras, while tall stone pillars and gothic arches rise toward the ornate domed ceiling. The checkered marble floor extends toward the distant altar as the camera maintains a steady following position.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral apse beneath ornate domed ceiling

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the intricate ceiling dome and artwork

agents.ego_description: character continues walking toward the altar while camera tilts up to reveal ceiling details

entered.detail: large circular window at the top of the dome allowing light to enter
intricate painted patterns and golden decorative elements on the dome interior

segments.scene_description: Approaching the cathedral's apse, the camera tilts upward to showcase the magnificent domed ceiling. The intricate ceiling artwork with golden decorations and the central circular window become the focal point as the character continues walking beneath the grand vault.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a narrow wooden entrance into the expansive, light-filled interior of a grand gothic cathedral. It begins as the character walks through a doorway, moving from the confined threshold into the main nave where checkered marble floors and wooden choir stalls first appear. As the character proceeds down the central aisle, the scene expands to reveal towering stone pillars and gothic arches lined with brass candelabras that lead the eye toward a distant altar. The camera then maintains its steady following position before tilting upward as the character approaches the apse, shifting the focus from the floor to the magnificent domed ceiling. Finally, the view opens fully to showcase the intricate golden artwork and the central circular window of the grand vault.
